compiled_state.title: implementation-plan re-invocation guard: in-progress children may race with active sub-agents during parallel sprint
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: The re-invocation guard classifies in-progress children as flagged for review and includes them in the diff plan, but does not specify whether in-progress means read-only or editable. During parallel sprint execution an active sub-agent may be working against that task's acceptance criteria, making modification a race condition. Guard should either treat in-progress as read-only like closed, or explicitly require verifying no active sub-agent before touching it.
